title: Big Cats of the World
notice: Public collection demonstration only. No payment processing. No checkout. No customer data collection.
summary: Rights-gated public collection release using only RC17-approved non-restricted Lion and Tiger metadata assets.

assets.title: Lion
assets.required_credit_line: Source: Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF Flagship Species). Individual asset URL required before production publication.
assets.display_note: Text and metadata only. No final species image is displayed until item-level media rights are cleared.

assets.title: Tiger
assets.required_credit_line: Source: Global Biodiversity Information Facility (GBIF Flagship Species). Individual asset URL required before production publication.
assets.display_note: Text and metadata only. No final species image is displayed until item-level media rights are cleared.

education.title: Education resource
education.body: Use this collection to teach species literacy, rights-aware publishing, and attribution practices.

product_cta: Demo only — not for sale. No checkout or payment processing enabled.
